answer:
First, convert \(8.66 + j5.0\) to polar form. The magnitude is \(\sqrt{8.66^2 + 5.0^2} = \sqrt{75 + 25} = 10\), and the angle is \(\tan^{-1}(5.0/8.66) = 30^\circ\).  
Raising to the second power gives \(10^2 \angle (2 \times 30^\circ) = 100 \angle 60^\circ\), and to the fifth power gives \(10^5 \angle (5 \times 30^\circ) = 100,\!000 \angle 150^\circ\).  

This matches option J.  

\boxed{J}
